somali.explore_3_different_body_systems: Baadh 3 nidaam jireed oo kala duwan
somali.206_bones_support_protection_movement_: Lafo 206 — taageero, ilaalin, dhaqdhaqaaq, kaydinta macdanta, samaynta dhiigga.
somali.houses_meninges_brain_and_cranial_nerv: Waxay ka koobantahay meninges, maskax, iyo daloolada dareemayaasha madaxa. Tolmooyinka (coronal, sagittal, lambdoid) way isku dhegaan markuu ilmuhu gaaro 2 sano.
somali.600_muscles_movement_posture_heat_prod: Muruqyo 600+ — dhaqdhaqaaq, istaag, samaynta kulaylka, xasilinta xubnaha isku-xirka.
somali.heart_60_000_miles_of_vessels_5l_of_bl: Wadne, 60,000 mayl oo xididdo ah, 5L dhiig ah — wuxuu gudbiyaa O₂, nafaqooyin, hormoonno; wuxuu saaraa qashinka.
somali.cns_brain_spinal_cord_and_pns_31_spina: CNS (maskax + laf-dhabar) iyo PNS (31 lammaane oo dareemayaal dhabar ah, 12 lammaane oo dareemayaal madax ah, nidaamka dareemaha is-maamula).
somali.lightest_sleep_transition_from_wakeful: Hurdada ugu fudud — kala-guur ka soo baxa toosnaanta. Dhaqdhaqaaq indho oo tartiib ah, xoogga muruqa oo yaraanaya. Gariirka hypnic (dhaqdhaqaaqa myoclonic) waa caadi. Si fudud loo toosiyo. Mowjadaha vertex ee fiiqan waxay ka soo muuqdaan EEG.
somali.true_sleep_begins_core_body_temperatur: Hurdo dhab ah ayaa bilaabmaysa. Heerkulka gudaha jirka wuu hoos u dhacaa, garaaca wadnaha wuu gaabiyaa. Sleep spindles (qaraxyada thalamocortical) waxay ilaaliyaan hurdada waxayna xoojiyaan xusuusta dhaqdhaqaaqa. K-complexes waa mowjado waaweyn oo ka jawaabaya kicinta dibadda.
somali.deep_slow_wave_sleep_sws_most_restorat: Hurdo qoto dheer/mowjad gaaban (SWS). Marxaladda ugu soo celisa. Sii-deynta hormoonka koritaanka way gaartaa heerka ugu sarreeya. Nidaamka glymphatic wuxuu nadiifiyaa qashinka maskaxda (amyloid-β). Xoojinta xusuusta caddaynta ayaa dhacda. Ugu adag in la toosiyo; miyir-beel hurdo haddii la toosiyo.
somali.dreaming_stage_brain_is_highly_active_: Marxaladda riyada. Maskaxdu aad bay u firfircoon tahay (sida toosnaanta) laakiin jirku wuu curyaamaa (atonia iyada oo maskax-jirridu joojinayso dareemayaasha dhaqdhaqaaqa). Dhaqdhaqaaq indho oo degdeg ah oo isku-dubbariday. Farsamaynta xusuusta shucuurta iyo xallinta dhibaatada hal-abuurka. Wareegyadu way sii dheeraadaan habeenka intuu socdo.
somali.brodmann_areas_map_52_cytoarchitectura: Aagagga Brodmann waxay khariidad u sameeyaan 52 aag oo qaab-unug ah. Cortex-ka dhaqdhaqaaqa aasaasiga ah (aag 4), cortex-ka dareenka jirka aasaasiga ah (aag 3,1,2), cortex-ka aragga aasaasiga ah (aag 17), cortex-ka maqalka aasaasiga ah (aag 41,42). Cortex-ka prefrontal ayaa ugu dambeeya myelin (~25 sano).
somali.purkinje_cells_are_among_the_largest_n: Unugyada Purkinje waa mid ka mid ah dareemayaasha ugu waaweyn, mid kastaa wuxuu helaa qiyaastii 200,000 gelin synaptic ah. Cortex-ka cerebellar wuxuu leeyahay 3 lakab: molecular, Purkinje, granular. Cilmi-baaris cusub waxay muujinaysaa doorkiisa garashada, shucuurta, iyo luqadda.
somali.contains_nuclei_for_cranial_nerves_iii: Wuxuu ka koobanyahay nuclei dareemayaasha madaxa III–XII. Nidaamka reticular activating (RAS) waa "furaha shidaya" maskaxda — dhaawac wuxuu keenaa suuxdin. Isgoyska piramidka medulla: isgoyska dhaqdhaqaaqa wuxuu sharraxayaa xakamaynta dhaqdhaqaaqa dhinaca ka soo horjeeda.
somali.memory_replay_during_sleep_hippocampal: Dib-u-ciyaarinta xusuusta inta lagu jiro hurdada: dareemayaasha hippocampal waxay "dib u ciyaaraan" waaya-aragnimadii maalinta inta lagu jiro hurdada N3, iyagoo u wareejinaya xusuusaha neocortex. Unugyada grid ee cortex-ka entorhinal waxay siiyaan unugyada meel ee hippocampal iskuxidhka meelaha.
somali.fear_conditioning_pathway_auditory_cor: Waddada barashada cabsida: cortex-ka maqalka → amygdala dhinaca → amygdala dhexe → hypothalamus (jawaab walwal) + PAG (barafowga). Isdhexgalka amygdala-prefrontal wuxuu ogolaadaa xakamaynta shucuurta — aasaaska daaweynta CBT.
somali.key_nuclei_vpl_vpm_somatosensory_relay: Nuclei muhiim ah: VPL/VPM (gudbinta dareenka jirka), LGN (gudbinta aragga V1), MGN (gudbinta maqalka A1), pulvinar (feejignaan), kooxda nuclei hore (xusuus, wareegga Papez).
somali.thermostat_analogy_anterior_hypothalam: Tusaalaha thermostat: hypothalamus hore wuxuu kiciyaa qaboojin (ballaarinta xididada, dhidid); hypothalamus dambe wuxuu kiciyaa kululayn (gariir, cidhiidhinta xididada). Qandho = heer sare oo prostaglandins ka soo baxa caabuqa.
somali.split_brain_experiments_revealed_hemis: Tijaabooyinka maskax-kala-qaybinta waxay muujiyeen takhasus-gaarka barkinka: barkinka bidix = luqad, macquul; barkinka midig = farsamaynta meelaha, guud. Macluumaadka la siiyo hal goob-aragti waxaa farsameeya barkinka dhinaca ka soo horjeeda.
somali.dopamine_from_substantia_nigra_modulat: Dopamine ka yimaada substantia nigra wuxuu maamulaa waddooyinka tooska ah (D1, kicinaya) iyo kuwa aan tooska ahayn (D2, joojinaya). Luminta maamulkan Parkinson wuxuu keenaa dhibaato gaar ah oo bilaabista dhaqdhaqaaqa.
somali.returns_interstitial_fluid_absorbs_die: Wuxuu soo celiyaa dareeraha unugyada dhexdooda, wuxuu nuugaa dufanka cuntada, ilaalinta difaaca — 600–700 qanjidh lymph, thymus, beeryaro.
somali.major_visceral_organs_respiration_dige: Xubnaha waaweyn ee gudaha — neefsasho, dheefshiid, sifayn, xakamaynta endocrine.
somali.skin_largest_organ_2m_hair_nails_gland: Maqaarka (xubinta ugu weyn, ~2m²), timo, ciddiyo, qanjidho — xannib, xakamaynta kulaylka, dareen, samaynta fitamiin D.
somali.oxygen_delivery_and_co_removal_12_20_b: Gaarsiinta oksijiinta iyo saaridda CO₂ — neefsasho ~12–20 daqiiqadii, hawo ~6L daqiiqadii, alveoli 300 milyan.
somali.hormone_producing_glands_regulate_meta: Qanjidhada soo saara hormoonka — waxay xakameeyaan dheefshiid, koritaan, taranka, walwal, homeostasis iyada oo loo maro fariimaha kiimikada.
somali.male_and_female_reproductive_organs_ga: Xubnaha taranka lab iyo dheddig — samaynta gametes, bacrimin, koritaanka uurjiifka, xakamaynta hormoonka.
somali.the_circulatory_system_delivers_deoxyg: Nidaamka wareegga dhiigga wuxuu gaarsiiyaa dhiigga aan lahayn oksijiin sambabbada, halkaas oo nidaamka neefsashadu ku buuxiyo oksijiin oo saaro carbon dioxide iyada oo loo maro xuubka khafiifka ah ee alveoli-capillary.
somali.motor_neurons_from_the_nervous_system_: Dareemayaasha dhaqdhaqaaqa ee nidaamka dareemaha waxay sii daayaan acetylcholine isgoyska dareen-muruqa, iyagoo kiciya foosha fiilada muruqa. Iyada oo aan la helin calaamado dareemeed, muruqyadu ma dhaqaaqi karaan.
somali.muscles_attach_to_bones_via_tendons_an: Muruqyadu waxay ku dhegaan lafaha iyaga oo maraya seedaha waxayna jiidaan xubnaha isku-xirka, iyagoo abuuraya nidaamyada lever. Qalfoofku wuxuu bixiyaa lever adag; muruqyadu waxay bixiyaan xoogga jiidista.
somali.the_hypothalamus_pituitary_axis_releas: Axis hypothalamus-pituitary wuxuu sii daayaa FSH iyo LH kuwaas oo xakameeya qanjidhada taranka. Estrogen, progesterone, iyo testosterone ee ka yimaada xubnaha taranka waxay jawaab u celiyaan nidaamka endocrine.
somali.the_lymphatic_system_returns_interstit: Nidaamka lymph wuxuu soo celiyaa dareeraha unugyada dhexdooda wareegga dhiigga wuxuuna geeyaa unugyada difaaca ee laga sameeyo xubnaha lymph. Labada nidaamba waxay ilaaliyaan homeostasis dareeraha waxayna la dagaallamaan caabuqa.
somali.the_hypothalamus_bridges_the_nervous_a: Hypothalamus wuxuu isku xiraa nidaamyada dareemaha iyo endocrine — wuxuu isku daraa calaamadaha dareemaha wuxuuna u tarjumaa amarro hormoon oo xakameeya qanjidhka pituitary iyo dhammaan silsiladaha hormoonka ee ka hooseeya.
somali.the_diaphragm_and_intercostal_muscles_: Diaphragm iyo muruqyada feedhaha dhexdooda waxay si jireed u ballaariyaan oo u cidhiidhiyaan godka laabta si ay hawada u dhaqaajiyaan. Sambabbadu iyagu muruq ma laha waxayna gebi ahaanba ku tiirsan yihiin muruqyada ku hareeraysan.
somali.the_skin_contains_millions_of_speciali: Maqaarka wuxuu ka koobanyahay malaayiin dhammaad dareemeyaal gaar ah iyo qaataha xiran oo dareema taabasho, cadaadis, heerkul, iyo xanuun, iyagoo si joogto ah u siiya nidaamka dareemaha xog dareen.
somali.blood_from_the_gi_tract_drains_through: Dhiigga ka yimaada mareenka GI wuxuu ku dareeraa xididka hepatic portal si toos ah beerka ka hor inta uusan galin wareegga guud, taasoo u ogolaanaysa beerka inuu marka hore farsameeyo nafaqada oo uu saaro sunta.
somali.bone_marrow_blood_cell_production: Samaynta Unugyada Dhiigga ee Dhuuxa Lafta
somali.red_bone_marrow_inside_the_skeleton_is: Dhuuxa lafta cas ee ku dhex jira qalfoofku waa goobta ay ka dhashaan dhammaan unugyada dhiigga. Unugyada dhiigga cas, unugyada dhiigga cad, iyo platelets dhammaantood halkan ayaa laga sameeyaa iyada oo loo maro samaynta dhiigga.
somali.which_structure_is_most_likely_affecte: Qaab-dhismeedkee ayaa ugu badan inuu saameeyo?
somali.patellofemoral_pain_syndrome_occurs_wh: Cudurka xanuunka patellofemoral wuxuu dhacaa marka xarragada jilibku aanay si fiican ugu dhaqaaqin dooxadeeda femurka. Cadaadis soo noqnoqda oo orodka ka yimaada wuxuu keenaa xanaaq cartilage. Daaweyntu waxay ka kooban tahay xoojinta quad, xasilinta miskaha, iyo beddelka waxqabadka.
somali.which_structure_is_most_likely_torn: Qaab-dhismeedkee ayaa ugu badan inuu jeexmo?
somali.the_supraspinatus_is_the_most_commonly: Supraspinatus waa muruqa rotator cuff ee ugu badan jeexmada. Wuxuu maraa acromion hoostiisa halkaas oo uu la kulmo cadaadis iyo jeexitaan. Shaqada madaxa korkiisa sida rinjiyaynta ayaa si weyn u kordhisa khatartan.
somali.racing_heart_after_exercise: Wadne Degdeg u Garaacaya Jimicsiga Kadib
somali.which_structure_controls_the_normal_he: Qaab-dhismeedkee ayaa xakameeya garaaca wadnaha caadiga ah?
somali.the_sa_node_in_the_right_atrium_is_the: SA node ee atrium-ka midig waa pacemaker dabiiciga ah ee wadnaha. Inta lagu jiro jimicsi daran, adrenaline wuxuu keeni karaa garaac aan waxyeello lahayn markuu garaaca wadnuhu hagaajinayo. Arrhythmias sii socda waa in la baaro si looga saaro cudurka wadnaha ee qaab-dhismeedka.
somali.carpal_tunnel_syndrome_is_compression_: Cudurka carpal tunnel waa cadaadinta dareemaha median ee ka hooseeya flexor retinaculum curcurka. Dareemaha median wuxuu siiyaa suulka iyo 3.5 farood ee hore dareen. Isticmaalka soo noqnoqda ee curcurka waa qatar weyn.
somali.what_diagnosis_must_be_urgently_ruled_: Baaritaankee ayaa si degdeg ah looga saarayaa?
somali.painless_lymphadenopathy_with_b_sympto: Bararka qanjidhada lymph oo aan xanuun lahayn, oo leh calaamadaha B (dhidid habeen, miisaan yaraan, qandho) waa astaanta caadiga ah ee Hodgkin lymphoma dhallinyarada. Biopsy muujinaya unugyada Reed-Sternberg wuxuu xaqiijiyaa baaritaanka.
somali.which_cells_failed_and_what_is_the_eme: Unugyadee ayaa fashilmay, waana maxay xaaladda degdegga ah?
somali.beta_cells_of_islets_of_langerhans_dia: Unugyada beta ee islets of Langerhans; Diabetic Ketoacidosis (DKA)
somali.without_insulin_from_beta_cells_glucos: Insulin la’aan oo unugyada beta ka timaada, glucose ma geli karo unugyada. Jirku wuxuu gubaa dufanka, isagoo soo saaraya ketones kuwaas oo dhiigga ka dhigaya aashito. Neefsashada Kussmaul waxay magdhabaan iyada oo la saarayo CO2. Daaweyn: dareere IV, insulin drip, iyo beddelka electrolyte.
somali.why_is_the_middle_third_of_the_clavicl: Maxay saddex-meelaha dhexe ee clavicle u tahay meesha ugu badan jabka?
somali.the_middle_third_is_thinnest_and_has_n: Saddex-meelaha dhexe ayaa ugu khafiifsan mana laha xoojin muruq
somali.the_clavicle_is_the_most_frequently_fr: Clavicle waa lafta ugu badan jabka. Saddex-meelaha dhexe ayaa ugu khafiifsan mana laha ilaalin muruq. Xoogga ka yimaada dhicitaanka gacan fidsan wuxuu ku uruuraa meeshan daciifka ah. Inta badan waxay ku bogsadaan xidhitaan gacan.
somali.why_does_altitude_cause_these_symptoms: Maxay sarreynta u keentaa calaamadahan, qaab-dhismeedkee ayaana ugu cadaadis badan?
somali.the_alveoli_and_respiratory_muscles_re: Alveoli iyo muruqyada neefsashada; oksijiinta jawiga oo yaraatay waxay keentaa hypoxia
somali.at_high_altitude_atmospheric_pressure_: Meel sarreysa, cadaadiska jawigu wuu hoos u dhacaa, isagoo yaraynaya cadaadiska qayb ee oksijiinta. Oksijiin yar ayaa maraysa xuubka alveoli. Jirku wuu magdhabaa isagoo si degdeg ah oo qoto dheer u neefsanaya, isagoo kordhinaya shaqada muruqa neefsashada.
somali.follow_a_red_blood_cell_through_the_en: Raac unug dhiig cas ah dhammaan nidaamka wareegga dhiigga.
somali.deoxygenated_blood_from_the_body_enter: Dhiigga aan lahayn oksijiin ee ka yimaada jirku wuxuu galaa atrium midig isagoo maraya vena cava sare iyo hoose.
somali.blood_passes_through_the_tricuspid_val: Dhiigga wuxuu maraa valve-ka tricuspid isagoo galaya ventricle midig, kaas oo u tuujiya sambabbada.
somali.the_right_ventricle_ejects_blood_throu: Ventricle midig wuxuu tuuraa dhiigga isagoo maraya valve-ka pulmonary galaya halbowlaha pulmonary ee labada sambab.
somali.in_the_alveolar_capillaries_co2_is_rel: Capillaries-ka alveoli, CO2 waa la sii daayaa O2 waana la qaataa iyada oo loo maro xuubka alveoli khafiifka ah.
somali.freshly_oxygenated_blood_returns_to_th: Dhiigga cusub ee oksijiin helay wuxuu ku noqdaa wadnaha isagoo maraya afarta xidid ee pulmonary.
somali.the_four_pulmonary_veins_empty_oxygena: Afarta xidid pulmonary waxay ku shubaan dhiigga oksijiin leh atrium bidix, kaas oo buuxsama kadibna u riixa isagoo maraya valve-ka mitral.
somali.blood_passes_through_the_mitral_valve_: Dhiigga wuxuu maraa valve-ka mitral isagoo galaya ventricle bidix ee muruqa leh, qolka ugu xoog badan wadnaha.
somali.the_left_ventricle_powerfully_ejects_b: Ventricle bidix wuxuu si xoog leh u tuuraa dhiigga isagoo maraya valve-ka aorta galaya aorta, waddada weyn ee jirka.
somali.arteries_branch_into_arterioles_and_ca: Halbowlayaashu waxay u kala baxaan arterioles iyo capillaries halkaas oo la gaarsiiyo O2 iyo nafaqooyin lana ururiyo CO2/qashin.
somali.deoxygenated_blood_returns_through_ven: Dhiigga aan lahayn oksijiin wuxuu ku soo noqdaa venules iyo xididada, isagoo la kaashanaya boombooyinka muruqa iyo valfyada, ilaa atrium midig.
somali.trace_the_journey_of_a_breath_of_air_f: Raac safarka neefta hawada laga bilaabo sanka ilaa alveoli iyo dib u soo noqoshada.
somali.air_enters_through_the_nostrils_and_is: Hawadu waxay gashaa dulal sanka waana la kululeeyaa, la qoyaa, waana la sifeeyaa iyada oo loo maro xuubabka xabka iyo turbinates.
somali.air_passes_through_the_nasopharynx_and: Hawadu waxay martaa nasopharynx iyo oropharynx, waddo lala wadaago mareenka cuntada.
somali.air_crosses_the_vocal_cords_in_the_voi: Hawadu waxay gudubtaa xadhkaha codka ee sanduuqa codka. Epiglottis wuxuu ka ilaaliyaa cuntada inay gasho waddada hawada.
somali.the_trachea_windpipe_is_reinforced_by_: Duunta hawadu waxaa xoojiya wareegyada cartilage ee qaabka C leh. Cilia waxay kor u dhaqaajiyaan xabka si ay u qabtaan wasakhda.
somali.the_trachea_splits_into_left_and_right: Duunta hawadu waxay u kala baxdaa bronchi weyn bidix iyo midig, mid kastaa wuxuu galaa hal sambab. Waxay u kala baxaan bronchioles yaryar.
somali.300_million_grape_like_sacs_where_gas_: Kiishash 300 milyan oo canab u eg halkaas oo isweydaarsiga gaasku dhaco. O2 wuxuu ku faafaa dhiigga; CO2 wuxuu u faafaa dibedda. Bedka dusha wuxuu la mid yahay garoon tennis.
somali.the_diaphragm_relaxes_and_rises_reduci: Diaphragm wuu debcaa oo kor u kacaa, isagoo yaraynaya mugga sambabada. Hawada CO2 badan waxaa dibedda loo riixaa iyada oo la maraya waddo la mid ah oo dib u socota.
somali.follow_a_meal_from_mouth_through_the_e: Raac cunto laga bilaabo afka dhammaan nidaamka dheefshiidka.
somali.teeth_mechanically_break_food_down_sal: Ilkuhu waxay si makaanik ah u jajabiyaan cuntada. Amylase candhuufta ayaa bilaaba dheefshiidka istaarijka. Carrabku wuxuu cuntada u sameeyaa bolus.
somali.swallowing_pushes_the_bolus_past_the_e: Liqiddu waxay bolus u riixaan epiglottis. Mowjadaha peristaltic waxay hoos ugu dhaqaajiyaan esophagus 25cm ah qiyaastii 8 ilbiriqsi.
somali.gastric_acid_ph_1_5_3_5_and_pepsin_bre: Aashitada caloosha (pH 1.5-3.5) iyo pepsin waxay jajabiyaan borotiinnada. Wareejinta waxay soo saartaa chyme 2-4 saacadood.
somali.the_first_25cm_of_the_small_intestine_: Kan 25cm ee ugu horreeya xiidmaha yaryar wuxuu ka helaa xameeti beerka/kiishka xameetida iyo enzymes-ka pancreas.
somali.most_nutrient_absorption_occurs_here_v: Nuugista nafaqada intooda badan halkan ayay ka dhacdaa iyada oo loo maro villi iyo microvilli, kordhinaya bedka dusha 600 jeer. Dhererka 6-7 mitir.
somali.water_and_electrolytes_are_reabsorbed_: Biyaha iyo electrolytes waa dib loo nuugaa. Bakteeriyada xiidmaha waxay khamiiriyaan fiber-ka hadhay, iyagoo soo saaraya fitamiinnada K iyo B12.
somali.waste_is_compacted_and_stored_in_the_r: Qashinka waa la cadaadiyaa waana lagu kaydiyaa rectum ilaa saxarada. Safarka oo dhan wuxuu qaataa 24-72 saacadood.
somali.trace_a_reflex_arc_from_stimulus_to_re: Raac qaanso reflex ah laga bilaabo kicinta ilaa jawaabta.
somali.a_sensory_receptor_in_the_skin_detects: Qaataha dareenka ee maqaarka (sida taabashada dusha kulul) wuxuu ogaadaa kicinta xanuunka wuxuuna soo saaraa calaamad koronto.
somali.the_signal_travels_along_a_sensory_aff: Calaamaddu waxay ku socotaa dareemaha dareenka (afferent) ilaa laf-dhabarka xawaare gaaraya 120 m/s iyada oo loo maro gudbinta saltatory.
somali.in_the_dorsal_horn_the_sensory_neuron_: Geeska dhabarka, dareemaha dareenku wuxuu synapse la sameeyaa interneuron. Reflexes, calaamaddu uma baahna inay gaarto maskaxda.
somali.the_interneuron_in_the_spinal_gray_mat: Interneuron-ka maaddada cawlan ee laf-dhabarka wuxuu isku daraa calaamadda wuxuuna u gudbiyaa dareemaha dhaqdhaqaaqa.
somali.the_motor_efferent_neuron_carries_the_: Dareemaha dhaqdhaqaaqa (efferent) wuxuu qaadaa calaamadda amarka geeska hore ilaa muruqa la bartilmaameedsaday.
somali.acetylcholine_released_at_the_neuromus: Acetylcholine la sii daayo isgoyska dareen-muruqa wuxuu keenaa foosha muruqa. Gacantaada ayaad dib u jiiddaa ka hor inta aadan dareemin xanuunka.
somali.meanwhile_a_copy_of_the_signal_ascends: Isla markaas, nuqul calaamadda ah wuxuu kor ugu baxaa cortex-ka dareenka jirka. Waxaad si miyir leh u dareemaysaa xanuunka qiyaastii 0.5 ilbiriqsi reflex-ka kadib.
somali.sorry_i_could_not_connect_to_the_ai_tu: Waan ka xumahay, hadda ma xidhiidhin karo macallinka AI.
somali.ai_tutor_is_not_available_in_this_envi: Macallinka AI laguma heli karo deegaankan.
somali.click_any_organ_to_see_its_structure_f: Guji xubin kasta si aad u aragto qaab-dhismeedkeeda, shaqadeeda, iyo xidhiidhkeeda. Dul saar si aad u hesho astaamo fudud; taabo si aad u hesho faahfaahin dheer.
somali.step_through_each_major_part_in_pedago: Mar qaybta weyn kasta si waxbarasho ah. Waddada ugu fiican ardayda markii ugu horreysay — waxay daboolaysaa qaab-dhismeed → shaqo → isku-dhafka hal mar.
somali.no_system_works_alone_the_kidney_filte: Ma jiro nidaam keligiis shaqeeya. Kelyaha wuxuu sifeeyaa dhiigga (wadne iyo xididdo), wuxuu ka jawaabaa ADH (endocrine), wuxuu saaraa urea (wax-soo-saar dheefshiid). Hel xidhiidhada.
somali.ask_a_question_about_the_active_organ_: Weydii su’aal ku saabsan xubinta ama nidaamka firfircoon. Macallinku wuu yaqaan waxa shaashadda ku jira wuxuuna u habeeyaa jawaabaha heerkaaga fasalka.
